commands_run: printf 'env keys in .env:\n'; rg -n '^(LIVE_UPDATE_TRACE_CHANNEL_ID|TOPIC_EDITOR_PUBLISHING_ENABLED|LIVE_UPDATE_EDITOR_BACKEND)=' .env; printf 'env keys in .env.example:\n'; rg -n '^(LIVE_UPDATE_TRACE_CHANNEL_ID|TOPIC_EDITOR_PUBLISHING_ENABLED|LIVE_UPDATE_EDITOR_BACKEND)=' .env.example
test -f supabase/.temp/project-ref && printf 'project-ref=' && cat supabase/.temp/project-ref || true; test -f supabase/config.toml && rg -n '^project_id|^\[api\]' supabase/config.toml || true

set -a; . ./.env >/dev/null 2>&1; set +a; printf 'SUPABASE_URL_SET=%s
' "${SUPABASE_URL:+yes}"; printf 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY_SET=%s
' "${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY:+yes}"; printf 'SUPABASE_ANON_KEY_SET=%s
' "${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY:+yes}"; if [ -n "$SUPABASE_URL" ] && [ -n "$SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" ]; then code=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/topic_editor_rest_probe.out -w '%{http_code}' "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/" -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"); printf 'REST_HTTP=%s
' "$code"; fi

set -a; . ./.env >/dev/null 2>&1; set +a; printf 'REST_URL_HOST='; printf '%s' "$SUPABASE_URL" | sed -E 's#https://([^/]+).*#\1#'; printf '
'; for k in SUPABASE_KEY SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY SUPABASE_ANON_KEY SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN; do eval v=\${$k:+yes}; printf '%s=%s
' "$k" "$v"; done; key="${SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY:-${SUPABASE_KEY:-${SUPABASE_ANON_KEY:-}}}"; if [ -n "$SUPABASE_URL" ] && [ -n "$key" ]; then code=$(curl -sS -o /tmp/supabase_rest_probe.out -w '%{http_code}' "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/?select=1" -H "apikey: $key" -H "Authorization: Bearer $key"); printf 'REST_HTTP=%s
' "$code"; fi

set -a; . ./.env >/dev/null 2>&1; set +a; body=$(curl -sS https://discord.com/api/v10/users/@me -H "Authorization: Bot $DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN"); printf '%s\n' "$body" | python -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("DISCORD_USER_ID="+str(d.get("id"))); print("DISCORD_USERNAME="+str(d.get("username"))); print("DISCORD_BOT="+str(d.get("bot")))'

set -a; . ./.env >/dev/null 2>&1; set +a; printf 'TRACE_CHANNEL_ID=%s
' "$LIVE_UPDATE_TRACE_CHANNEL_ID"; printf 'PUBLISHING_ENABLED=%s
' "$TOPIC_EDITOR_PUBLISHING_ENABLED"; printf 'EDITOR_BACKEND=%s
' "$LIVE_UPDATE_EDITOR_BACKEND"; printf 'BOT_USER_ID=%s
' "$BOT_USER_ID"
